title: Lower Body Focus
description: Leg strength with goblet squat and reverse lunges followed by intense core work

exercises.name: Joint rotations
exercises.instructions: Neck, shoulders, wrists, hips, ankles - slow and controlled

exercises.name: Butt kicks
exercises.instructions: Run in place, heels to glutes

exercises.name: Hip 90/90
exercises.instructions: Seated, legs at 90 degrees, twist side to side

exercises.name: World's greatest stretch
exercises.instructions: Lunge + torso rotation + arm to the sky

exercises.name: Goblet squat (no weight)
exercises.instructions: Hands in front of the chest, sit deep

exercises.name: Reverse lunges
exercises.instructions: Big step backward, lower the knee

exercises.name: Single-leg Romanian deadlift
exercises.instructions: On one leg, lean torso forward, back leg extended

exercises.name: Bicycle crunches
exercises.instructions: Elbow to opposite knee alternating, leg extended

exercises.name: Bear hold
exercises.instructions: On all fours, knees 2cm off the floor, hold

exercises.name: Leg raises
exercises.instructions: Back on the floor, lift extended legs to vertical

exercises.name: Psoas stretch
exercises.instructions: Low lunge, drive the hip forward

exercises.name: Pigeon stretch
exercises.instructions: Front leg bent in front, back leg extended, lean forward

exercises.name: Hamstring stretch
exercises.instructions: Leg extended forward, lean torso forward

exercises.name: Deep breathing
exercises.instructions: Inhale 4s through the nose, hold 4s, exhale 6s through the mouth
